nodes.name: Sulphur-bellied flycatcher

nodes.name: Myiodynastes
nodes.summary: Myiodynastes（Myiodynastes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如Golden-bellied flycatcher、Golden-crowned flycatcher、Baird's flycatcher等5种鸟类。
